purpose: Consume the 骨架生成模版 to create governed directory skeletons and the first matching 治理映射模版.
instruction: scaffold creates external skeleton files under a user-specified directory
scaffold creates the first matching internal 治理映射模版 files automatically
scaffold keeps external and internal path mapping one-to-one
workflow: choose one governed file kind or all supported kinds
create the first matching internal 治理映射模版 files
update the scan rule asset and sync the installed skill
rules: scaffold must support dry-run before any real write
scaffold creates skeletons only; user governance still decides final content
scaffold must not treat the 骨架生成模版 as the long-term source of truth after initialization
